---
title: "In-Class Exercise 1:</br>Exercise Name"
author: "CHUA Wee Tian"
date: "April 18, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

## 1.1 In-Class Exercise 1 Overview

In this exercise... Tableau

::: callout-note
Superstore.xls
:::
